prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-DIECASTCARSET-25PC Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 25pc Race Car Diecast Toy Cars Playset for Boys, Ages 3+ Description: Calling little ones with a need for speed. The Kidplokio Multicolor Diecast Toy Cars Playset for Boys comes with 25 different individual cars for hours of racing fun. A great value, multipurpose race car set that kids can use in conjunction with other car toys too. The large assortment of different colorful cars to choose from makes this toy car set totally unique.

With 25 different individual toy cars to choose from, kids won't know which car to play with first. This ultimate fleet diecast car playset from Kidplokio is a fantastic starter set kids can play solo or with friends or siblings with lots of cars to go around and share.

Designed with small hands in mind, these car toys for boys are excellent models for little ones to develop their fine motor skills and hand eye coordination while handling the race cars; and, not only is great for physical development, the cars will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay too. Made from safe, high quality materials so parents need not worry.

Family trips far away or neighbor next door play dates, the diecast cars are lightweight and easy to carry from one place to the next without any extra weight or bulk; With vibrant colors and super cool decals, this car set will have little one's engines revving whether at home or on the go.

Let the racing begin.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: kids toy car race track set mini racing game speed racing car toys for boys Christmas toys stocking stuffers Hanukkah gifts brother gifts fine motor skills toys hand eye coordination training toddler learning toys car accessories Features: - 25PC DIECAST TOY CARS: Calling little ones with a need for speed! The Kidplokio toy cars diecast playset for boys comes with 25 different individual cars for hours of racing fun; a great value, multipurpose toy cars set that kids can use in conjunction with other car toys too! - FINE MOTOR SKILLS TOYS: Designed with small hands in mind, these car toys for boys are excellent models for little ones to develop their fine motor skills and hand eye coordination while handling the race cars; and, not only is great for physical development, the cars will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay too! - 25 UNIQUE TOY CARS TO CHOOSE FROM: With 25 different individual toy cars to choose from, kids won't know which car to play with first! This ultimate fleet diecast car playset from Kidplokio is a fantastic starter set kids can play solo or with friends or siblings with lots of cars to go around and share - GREAT TOYS TO TRAVEL WITH: Family trips far away or neighbor next door play dates, the diecast cars are lightweight and easy to carry from one place to the next without any extra weight or bulk; With vibrant colors and super cool decals, this car set will have little one's engines revving whether at home or on the go! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 17 x 10 x 1 inches; Weight: 0.98lbs; Color: Multi; Material: Metal; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 25-pc Multicolor Diecast Toy Cars Playset

anthropic.title_differentiation: 25 Individual Cars, Fine Motor Skills Development, Portable Design, Ages 3 Plus, Lightweight Metal Construction

openai.title_differentiation: 25 Unique Cars Fine Motor Skills Playset Lightweight Travel Friendly Imaginative Racing Fun Ages 3 And Up
